mission.title: surrealdb: Bug: Abnormal memory usage
mission.description: Bug: Abnormal memory usage. This issue affects 10+ users.

steps.title: Identify surrealdb troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your surrealdb installation:
```bash
surreal version
surreal is-ready
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review surrealdb configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant surrealdb configuration:
### Describe the bug

I fill SurrealDB with nearly 4 millions of documents with storage TiKV
Each documents is like that : 
```
{
    "ActivityType": "playing",
    "Application": "Diablo 4648",
    "DateEnd": "2022-03-25T04:53:09.535708500Z",

steps.title: Apply the fix for Bug: Abnormal memory usage
steps.description:
Thank you for submitting this pull request! We appreciate you spending the time to work on these changes.

## What is the motivation?

Solve a memory leak that caused the server to get slower and slower, while memory usage would grow and grow.

The callback that was registered for the
```yaml
{
    "ActivityType": "playing",
    "Application": "Diablo 4648",
    "DateEnd": "2022-03-25T04:53:09.535708500Z",
    "DateStart": "2022-03-25T02:38:09.535708500Z",
    "Details": "Barbarian 4648",
    "State": "Level 4648",
    "Username": "toto-4648",
    "id": "activity:000044n6y109yktjlacu"
}
```

steps.title: Confirm Bug: Abnormal memory usage is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test surrealdb to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
Thank you for submitting this pull request! We appreciate you spending the time to work on these changes.

## What is the motivation?

Solve a memory leak that caused the server to get slower and slower, while memory usage would grow and grow.
codeSnippets: select count() from activity group all;

prerequisites.description: A working surrealdb installation or development environment.
